title: Spartan KIck
description: Send your enemies flying with a powerful first-person kick
body:
##  Press V to launch enemies into oblivion with a devastating kick!
### Using Forge?
Check out the Kick mod by Hasi for the Forge equivalent: [Kick](https://modrinth.com/mod/hasi.kick)

### New 3rd Person Animation: 
![3rd person](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/608e0015439b04fede0d039513d85f93d7272152.gif)
![Pig](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a93428195b795b811934bb6c36eae37cbbc4a1f.gif)
![In action](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33821e1eb7decbdad4026d3d49b9ce5407f7b29f.gif)
![Villager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd15c9d33e791d46840952afa3ae7b1327e6b627.gif)
-  ## Unlock 3 powerful upgrade tiers hidden in Overworld dungeons, Nether fortresses, and End cities
![book](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e12aaabc1b2074c3a1d636b9065045daa36c5e6.png)

## - Kick open doors and detonate creepers on impact (Tier 1+)
![Doors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33108f9d975e5a9631add64810f1f53b5ef3c4a8.gif)
![creeper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6dad4536c7a60722b7c96f2afa070a6264a5a73d.gif)
- ## Default keybind is V, but rebinding to F is recommended 
- ## If you use a First Person Body mod (e.g. FirstPersonModel), disable the 'Render Leg (First Person)' setting, otherwise you will see two legs kicking at the same time.

 The commands to get the upgrade books are:
- /give @a spartankick:heavy_technique{Tier:1}
- /give @a spartankick:heavy_technique{Tier:2}
- /give @a spartankick:heavy_technique{Tier:3}
  
  

_Compatible with Better Combat_ 

### if you have any issues or suggestions, you can contact me at ratralfiofanov@gmail.com
